text: Science has a clearer story about autophagy than social media does. Autophagy is your body's way of cleaning out damaged cells, recycling components for energy. Without it, cells accumulate junk, leading to diseases like cancer and neurodegeneration. Studies show fasting and exercise boost autophagy, enhancing longevity and health. But remember, balance is key—excessive autophagy can be harmful too. Curious about how to optimize your health? Like and follow for more insights.
